error_signature: Invalid JSON in the response body
title: Invalid JSON response from webhook
symptom: The webhook response body evaluates correctly but throws an 'Invalid JSON' error when sent. This prevents the workflow from executing successfully.
not_this_if: Response body is a simple string without new lines
Error does not occur in production
root_cause: The presence of new lines in the JSON response body can cause it to be considered invalid. This is due to how JSON formatting rules interpret line breaks, which can lead to parsing errors when the response is sent.
fix_steps: Modify the JSON response to remove any new lines
Use the `.toJsonString()` method in the expression to ensure proper formatting
agent_instruction: Ensure the JSON response is formatted correctly by using `.toJsonString()`.
